TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_nipaluma-atipelec, title = nipaluma-atipelec, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/nipaluma-atipelec} }

S.FORM: == atipelec == šĹŅŚźõŚ≠ź u masay, yu adidi'ay henay u adidi'ay a kilang. mauzip i Taywan, China, India. masadumaay a ngangan Quisqualis indica L. (mitesekay a ngangan)Quisqualis indica L. šĹŅŚźõŚ≠źÁßĎ (sapamataan a ngangan)Combretaceae šĹŅŚźõŚ≠źŚĪ¨ (milecaday tu ngangan)atipelec a su (tada ngangan)liw-ciu-ce, si-cun-se, u-lin-ce, tun-cun-ce, pin-kan-ce, du'-ci-li-ce, suy-cun-mu-ya, san-yang-se, se'-kan-ce, se'-kan-ce, se'-kan-ken Rangoon Creeper (ingu a ngangan)Rangoon Creeper ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Sidi Tu Isah,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Atipelec (kamu nu binacadan)Bunun Sidi Tu Isah,Sakidaya ŚłÉŤĺ≤,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ,ťĄí (mitaduay nu binacadan)Bunun, Sakidaya, Co Atipelec,ťĄí Vungavung Mitatin (kamunu binacadan)Bunun Sidi Tu Isah,Sakidaya Atipelec,Co Vungavung Mitatin kaliwasak nu langaw manamuh mulangaw i dihekuay a kitidaan, misuayaw tu cilal misudikud tu bali a kakitidaan, sisa hina adih kita i buyubuyuan, kilangkilangan, nipalumaan nutaw a maadih, ayda hantu i Taywan yadahtu ku palumaay tina langawan aadihan nu katuuday, katuu'd ku palumaay i luma' mala langad atu kakila lidungan nu dadan. bangcal ku langaw nu balu, taneng mala ilumaay a aadihan, sangan tu kilalidungan nu dadan atu aadihan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) sasapaiyuan i sanek han, adidi' kuni ka sicedaman, adidi' ku duku, taneng mipatay tuibiliay a cilekay atu milawpes tu i udipay a nanum paka kapah tu buwa', saka pingaayan tu imelanghan unika adadaan nu bili', sicilekay ku bili' nu wawa, u'hu'h, basal, katela'apan, mahicaay kya ku sawada', kahun nu adadaan sa. (kamu nu Hulam: .) milihida tu langaw musakamu atipelec u atipelec a langawan, atipelec a langawan han u hina hetikay ku papah apuyu ku langaw numi laladay a langawan, mah'ka mulutuc han patelak tapabawsa ku langaw, nikudan satu u akaway nu lali papahan, kala siceka' an ku langaw, adidi' henay kulangawsa kala tai'tai'an ku langaw nu kulit sibanuh. (kamu nu Hulam: .) nu cacayay a akawayan cacay ku papah nai'ku batac, wayway nu papah i lilis idaw ku apuyuay a masa ti'kukay atu satanayu' sananay kuni kakimulmul, tanayuhan makaala tu walu-sabawcacay a kun-fun, ahebal han makaala tu lima a kun-fun. (kamu nu Hulam: .) i lima-pulu' a bulad kala bangasisan nu limaay a sa semaan a babaluwan, bilbil nu balu han naw sanglacay henay hamawsa a mala sumanah ku kulit, yadah ku balu nai' ku akaway, nika silsilan nai' kuwatan tuni tu kakabitan tu akawayan, macebal satu ku balu sulecadsa ku silac, numasa sakakuay a kakicuhan lima' kunika papela, tama a baluhan makaala tu pulu' a babaluan. (kamu nu Hulam:śĖľ5-10 10śěö.) nika minan tu asibalu, malaheci tu mahida' u cukana' ku heci nida kala lumelumenian ku pa'nu', sadicem sa lima ku kuku', cacay kui labuay nu sanglacaya a sasapalan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) picidekan a wayway hina hetikay a papah nu milaladay a lalangawan,u langawhan nida kala tai'tai'an ku kulit apuyu ku banuh, mahka mulutucay a langawhan malecad tu kala tai'tai'an ku kulit sibanuh, langaw sahenay patelek ku akaway, nikudan a papah nu akaway masumad, kala sicekacekaan sa malingatu tu amilalad. masasuayaw ku papah i akaway, idaw ku apuyuay a akawayan, satanayu sa kunika mulmul, inuayawan han kala dicendicenman, angangan han mahida u balucu' ku wayway, pulung nu lilisan, u tanayu makaala tu tu pitu‚Äďsabaw tusa a kun-fun, u ahebalhan han maka alatu sepat-enem a kun-fun, papah nu akaway han nu balakiay tu a lalangawan, hamaw satu a atekak kala sicekacekaan tu. (kamu nu Hulam:ŤĎČŚįćÁĒü,śúČÁü≠śüĄ, .) macebal ku balu nai' ku kakicuh aapuyu ku akaway maca celcelay kunika si baluan, sema nu baluhan naw sanglacay alaw mala sumanahay, idaw ku bangsis, lima ku asasemaan a baluwan, satanayu'sa ku kakicuh, lima kunika papelaan, nikapapela'an han masa sangkaku, tama han a baluwan pulu' ku sasemaan nu balu, adidi mahida u keliw aapuyu ku ngisngis, i sisasa' ku sasapalan, tanayu' ku kakabitan nu balu. u hecih mahida u cukana', maduhem satu kala lumelumenian, lima ku kuku'. kasi baluwan atu kaduheman nu heci sa i lima a bulad katukuh i pulu' a bulad. (kamu nu Hulam: 5~10 śúą.) dumasatu nuni kasingangan tina langawan namakayni i tademaw, namahida yu mukasi idaw ku i Pan-coay a niyaduan, idaw ku cacayay a misaydangay ci Kuo-se-cun sakamu sa, hina miala' cinida tu heci nu atipelec sapingay tu nu wawaan a imelan, sisa dateng nu tilu a tademaw, pangangan han tu kina langaw u atipelec han. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kakinkiwan tu sasapaiyuwan nina maduhemay a atipelec nu heci kanca a hudhuden ku maduhemay a heci, i kabanglangbangaan han u pudac nu heci kalakiyu lumenian sa taneng tu alaan, siluden alan ku damud sa pawalian tu cilal atu mihudhud. uhekal kala lumelumenian katukuh tu kiyukiyuwan kunika lumeni' ku kulit, malikad a adihan ku pudac, satanayu' sa kunika kimulmul atu makimulmul, pelaen amicikcik mahida u bunac kunika lima ku madiicemay nu kuku', inikadiceman nu kuku' kibetul ku paduh, teban hantu makimulmul nai' ku labuay, atekaksa ku paduh, u sasapalan a paduh han duhepic hina hetik, heci nu papahan kala lawlawan sangsanglacan ku kulit, tusa ku sasemaan nu balu, maputun kunika pelaan nu sasulit, idaw kusi simalay, adidi' kunika bangsian, kala sicesicedaman ku sanek. (kamu nu Hulam: ,ŚĎ≥ŚĺģÁĒú.) nina atipelec a langawan itini i "iyuay a cudad nu Cun-kuo" tusa a malebut idawku lima a mihcaan anika tahekalan i cudad, sakay i nu cunyaw a Atipelec nu langawan a alangawan, mangalay maydih pakayda i wayway nu langaw , mikuwan tu saka kapah nu sasapayuwan. mitaneng tu kakawaw anu mahica ku tabaki, kala kiyukiyuwan lumelumenian ku kulit, masadid ku paduh, mabiteli, kala lawlawan sangsanglacan ku kulit u sakapahay a sasapayuwan sa. (kamu nu Hulam: .) u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika Combretum indicum, also known as the Chinese honeysuckle or Rangoon creeper, is a vine with red flower clusters and is found in Asia. It is found in many other parts of the world either as a cultivated ornamental or run wild. Other names for the plant include Quiscual , Niyog-niyogan , Madhu Malti or Madhumalti , Modhumonjori (ŗ¶ģŗ¶ßŗßĀŗ¶ģŗ¶ěŗßćŗ¶úŗ¶įŗßÄ in Bengali; named by Rabindranath Tagore), Malati , Madhumaloti (ŗ¶ģŗ¶ßŗßĀŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗßčŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņ in Meitei), Akar Dani and Radha Manoharam .
S.PHON: == atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ == *** u masaj, ju adidi Ē~ °aj ńß…ônaj u adidi Ē~ °aj a kir~…ĺaŇč. mauzip i tajwan, ¶ńßina, india. masadumaaj a ŇčaŇčan *uis*uar~…ĺis indi ¶a r~…ĺ. (mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan)*uis*uar~…ĺis indi ¶a r~…ĺ. **** (sapamataan a ŇčaŇčan) ¶ombr…ôta ¶…ôa…ô **** (mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu ŇčaŇčan)atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ a su (tada ŇčaŇčan)r~…ĺiw- ¶iu- ¶…ô, si- ¶un-s…ô, u-r~…ĺin- ¶…ô, tun- ¶un- ¶…ô, pin-kan- ¶…ô, du Ē~ °- ¶i-r~…ĺi- ¶…ô, suj- ¶un-mu-ja, san-jaŇč-s…ô, s…ô Ē~ °-kan- ¶…ô, s…ô Ē~ °-kan- ¶…ô, s…ô Ē~ °-kan-k…ôn *aŇčoon ¶r…ô…ôp…ôr (iŇču a ŇčaŇčan)*aŇčoon ¶r…ô…ôp…ôr ** sidi tu isańß,**** atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ (kamu nu bina ¶adan)bunun sidi tu isańß,sakidaja **,****,* (mitaduaj nu bina ¶adan)bunun, sakidaja, ¶o atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶,* *uŇča*uŇč mitatin (kamunu bina ¶adan)bunun sidi tu isańß,sakidaja atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶, ¶o *uŇča*uŇč mitatin kar~…ĺiwasak nu r~…ĺaŇčaw manamuńß mur~…ĺaŇčaw i dińß…ôkuaj a kitidaan, misuajaw tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ misudikud tu bar~…ĺi a kakitidaan, sisa ńßina adińß kita i bujubujuan, kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan, nipar~…ĺumaan nutaw a maadińß, ajda ńßantu i tajwan jadańßtu ku par~…ĺumaaj tina r~…ĺaŇčawan aadińßan nu katuudaj, katuu Ē~ °d ku par~…ĺumaaj i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa r~…ĺaŇčad atu kakir~…ĺa r~…ĺiduŇčan nu dadan. baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku r~…ĺaŇčaw nu bar~…ĺu, tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺa ir~…ĺumaaj a aadińßan, saŇčan tu kir~…ĺar~…ĺiduŇčan nu dadan atu aadińßan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) sasapaijuan i san…ôk ńßan, adidi Ē~ ° kuni ka si ¶…ôdaman, adidi Ē~ ° ku duku, tan…ôŇč mipataj tuibir~…ĺiaj a ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj atu mir~…ĺawp…ôs tu i udipaj a nanum paka kapańß tu buwa Ē~ °, saka piŇčaajan tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčńßan unika adadaan nu bir~…ĺi Ē~ °, si ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ku bir~…ĺi Ē~ ° nu wawa, u Ē~ °ńßu Ē~ °ńß, basar~…ĺ, kat…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °apan, mańßi ¶aaj kja ku sawada Ē~ °, kańßun nu adadaan sa. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) mir~…ĺińßida tu r~…ĺaŇčaw musakamu atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ u atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ a r~…ĺaŇčawan, atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ a r~…ĺaŇčawan ńßan u ńßina ńß…ôtikaj ku papańß apuju ku r~…ĺaŇčaw numi r~…ĺar~…ĺadaj a r~…ĺaŇčawan, mańß Ē~ °ka mur~…ĺutu ¶ ńßan pat…ôr~…ĺak tapabawsa ku r~…ĺaŇčaw, nikudan satu u akawaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺi papańßan, kar~…ĺa si ¶…ôka Ē~ ° an ku r~…ĺaŇčaw, adidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj kur~…ĺaŇčawsa kar~…ĺa tai Ē~ °tai Ē~ °an ku r~…ĺaŇčaw nu kur~…ĺit sibanuńß. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) nu ¶a ¶ajaj a akawajan ¶a ¶aj ku papańß nai Ē~ °ku bata ¶, wajwaj nu papańß i r~…ĺir~…ĺis idaw ku apujuaj a masa ti Ē~ °kukaj atu satanaju Ē~ ° sananaj kuni kakimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, tanajuńßan makaar~…ĺa tu war~…ĺu-sabaw ¶a ¶aj a kun-fun, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima a kun-fun. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) i r~…ĺima-pur~…ĺu Ē~ ° a bur~…ĺad kar~…ĺa baŇčasisan nu r~…ĺimaaj a sa s…ômaan a babar~…ĺuwan, bir~…ĺbir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺu ńßan naw saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj ńß…ônaj ńßamawsa a mar~…ĺa sumanańß ku kur~…ĺit, jadańß ku bar~…ĺu nai Ē~ ° ku akawaj, nika sir~…ĺsir~…ĺan nai Ē~ ° kuwatan tuni tu kakabitan tu akawajan, ma ¶…ôbar~…ĺ satu ku bar~…ĺu sur~…ĺ…ô ¶adsa ku sir~…ĺa ¶, numasa sakakuaj a kaki ¶uńßan r~…ĺima Ē~ ° kunika pap…ôr~…ĺa, tama a bar~…ĺuńßan makaar~…ĺa tu pur~…ĺu Ē~ ° a babar~…ĺuan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:**-** ***.) nika minan tu asibar~…ĺu, mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu mańßida Ē~ ° u ¶ukana Ē~ ° ku ńß…ô ¶i nida kar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ôr~…ĺum…ônian ku pa Ē~ °nu Ē~ °, sadi ¶…ôm sa r~…ĺima ku kuku Ē~ °, ¶a ¶aj kui r~…ĺabuaj nu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aja a sasapar~…ĺan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) pi ¶id…ôkan a wajwaj ńßina ńß…ôtikaj a papańß nu mir~…ĺar~…ĺadaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan,u r~…ĺaŇčawńßan nida kar~…ĺa tai Ē~ °tai Ē~ °an ku kur~…ĺit apuju ku banuńß, mańßka mur~…ĺutu ¶aj a r~…ĺaŇčawńßan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu kar~…ĺa tai Ē~ °tai Ē~ °an ku kur~…ĺit sibanuńß, r~…ĺaŇčaw sańß…ônaj pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk ku akawaj, nikudan a papańß nu akawaj masumad, kar~…ĺa si ¶…ôka ¶…ôkaan sa mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu amir~…ĺar~…ĺad. masasuajaw ku papańß i akawaj, idaw ku apujuaj a akawajan, satanaju sa kunika mur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, inuajawan ńßan kar~…ĺa di ¶…ôndi ¶…ônman, aŇčaŇčan ńßan mańßida u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ku wajwaj, pur~…ĺuŇč nu r~…ĺir~…ĺisan, u tanaju makaar~…ĺa tu tu pitu*sabaw tusa a kun-fun, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺńßan ńßan maka ar~…ĺatu s…ôpat-…ôn…ôm a kun-fun, papańß nu akawaj ńßan nu bar~…ĺakiaj tu a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, ńßamaw satu a at…ôkak kar~…ĺa si ¶…ôka ¶…ôkaan tu. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:***,***, .) ma ¶…ôbar~…ĺ ku bar~…ĺu nai Ē~ ° ku kaki ¶uńß aapuju ku akawaj ma ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺaj kunika si bar~…ĺuan, s…ôma nu bar~…ĺuńßan naw saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺa sumanańßaj, idaw ku baŇčsis, r~…ĺima ku asas…ômaan a bar~…ĺuwan, satanaju Ē~ °sa ku kaki ¶uńß, r~…ĺima kunika pap…ôr~…ĺaan, nikapap…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °an ńßan masa saŇčkaku, tama ńßan a bar~…ĺuwan pur~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku sas…ômaan nu bar~…ĺu, adidi mańßida u k…ôr~…ĺiw aapuju ku ŇčisŇčis, i sisasa Ē~ ° ku sasapar~…ĺan, tanaju Ē~ ° ku kakabitan nu bar~…ĺu. u ńß…ô ¶ińß mańßida u ¶ukana Ē~ °, maduńß…ôm satu kar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ôr~…ĺum…ônian, r~…ĺima ku kuku Ē~ °. kasi bar~…ĺuwan atu kaduńß…ôman nu ńß…ô ¶i sa i r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad katukuńß i pur~…ĺu Ē~ ° a bur~…ĺad. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: *~** *.) dumasatu nuni kasiŇčaŇčan tina r~…ĺaŇčawan namakajni i tad…ômaw, namańßida ju mukasi idaw ku i pan- ¶oaj a nijaduan, idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a misajdaŇčaj ¶i kuo-s…ô- ¶un sakamu sa, ńßina miar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶inida tu ńß…ô ¶i nu atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ sapiŇčaj tu nu wawaan a im…ôr~…ĺan, sisa dat…ôŇč nu tir~…ĺu a tad…ômaw, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu kina r~…ĺaŇčaw u atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ ńßan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kakinkiwan tu sasapaijuwan nina maduńß…ômaj a atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ nu ńß…ô ¶i kan ¶a a ńßudńßud…ôn ku maduńß…ômaj a ńß…ô ¶i, i kabaŇčr~…ĺaŇčbaŇčaan ńßan u puda ¶ nu ńß…ô ¶i kar~…ĺakiju r~…ĺum…ônian sa tan…ôŇč tu ar~…ĺaan, sir~…ĺud…ôn ar~…ĺan ku damud sa pawar~…ĺian tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ atu mińßudńßud. uńß…ôkar~…ĺ kar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ôr~…ĺum…ônian katukuńß tu kijukijuwan kunika r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° ku kur~…ĺit, mar~…ĺikad a adińßan ku puda ¶, satanaju Ē~ ° sa kunika kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ atu makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, p…ôr~…ĺa…ôn ami ¶ik ¶ik mańßida u buna ¶ kunika r~…ĺima ku madii ¶…ômaj nu kuku Ē~ °, inikadi ¶…ôman nu kuku Ē~ ° kib…ôtur~…ĺ ku paduńß, t…ôban ńßantu makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ nai Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺabuaj, at…ôkaksa ku paduńß, u sasapar~…ĺan a paduńß ńßan duńß…ôpi ¶ ńßina ńß…ôtik, ńß…ô ¶i nu papańßan kar~…ĺa r~…ĺawr~…ĺawan saŇčsaŇčr~…ĺa ¶an ku kur~…ĺit, tusa ku sas…ômaan nu bar~…ĺu, maputun kunika p…ôr~…ĺaan nu sasur~…ĺit, idaw kusi simar~…ĺaj, adidi Ē~ ° kunika baŇčsian, kar~…ĺa si ¶…ôsi ¶…ôdaman ku san…ôk. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ,***.) nina atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ a r~…ĺaŇčawan itini i "ijuaj a ¶udad nu ¶un-kuo" tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idawku r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan anika tańß…ôkar~…ĺan i ¶udad, sakaj i nu ¶unjaw a atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ nu r~…ĺaŇčawan a ar~…ĺaŇčawan, maŇčar~…ĺaj majdińß pakajda i wajwaj nu r~…ĺaŇčaw , mikuwan tu saka kapańß nu sasapajuwan. mitan…ôŇč tu kakawaw anu mańßi ¶a ku tabaki, kar~…ĺa kijukijuwan r~…ĺum…ôr~…ĺum…ônian ku kur~…ĺit, masadid ku paduńß, mabit…ôr~…ĺi, kar~…ĺa r~…ĺawr~…ĺawan saŇčsaŇčr~…ĺa ¶an ku kur~…ĺit u sakapańßaj a sasapajuwan sa. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika ¶ombr…ôtum indi ¶um, ar~…ĺso known as tńß…ô ¶ńßin…ôs…ô ńßon…ôsu ¶kr~…ĺ…ô or *aŇčoon ¶r…ô…ôp…ôr, is a *in…ô witńß r…ôd fr~…ĺow…ôr ¶r~…ĺust…ôrs and is found in asia. it is found in manj otńß…ôr parts of tńß…ô worr~…ĺd …ôitńß…ôr as a ¶ur~…ĺti*at…ôd ornam…ôntar~…ĺ or run wir~…ĺd. otńß…ôr nam…ôs for tńß…ô pr~…ĺant in ¶r~…ĺud…ô *uis ¶uar~…ĺ , nijog-nijogan , madńßu mar~…ĺti or madńßumar~…ĺti , modńßumonjori (********* in b…ôŇčar~…ĺi; nam…ôd bj *abindranatńß tagor…ô), mar~…ĺati , madńßumar~…ĺoti (********* in m…ôit…ôi), akar dani and *adńßa manońßaram .
S.FORM: == atipelec == šĹŅŚźõŚ≠ź u masay, yu adidi'ay henay u adidi'ay a kilang. mauzip i Taywan, China, India. masadumaay a ngangan Quisqualis indica L. (mitesekay a ngangan)Quisqualis indica L. šĹŅŚźõŚ≠źÁßĎ (sapamataan a ngangan)Combretaceae šĹŅŚźõŚ≠źŚĪ¨ (milecaday tu ngangan)atipelec a su (tada ngangan)liw-ciu-ce, si-cun-se, u-lin-ce, tun-cun-ce, pin-kan-ce, du'-ci-li-ce, suy-cun-mu-ya, san-yang-se, se'-kan-ce, se'-kan-ce, se'-kan-ken Rangoon Creeper (ingu a ngangan)Rangoon Creeper ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Sidi Tu Isah,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Atipelec (kamu nu binacadan)Bunun Sidi Tu Isah,Sakidaya ŚłÉŤĺ≤,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ,ťĄí (mitaduay nu binacadan)Bunun, Sakidaya, Co Atipelec,ťĄí Vungavung Mitatin (kamunu binacadan)Bunun Sidi Tu Isah,Sakidaya Atipelec,Co Vungavung Mitatin kaliwasak nu langaw manamuh mulangaw i dihekuay a kitidaan, misuayaw tu cilal misudikud tu bali a kakitidaan, sisa hina adih kita i buyubuyuan, kilangkilangan, nipalumaan nutaw a maadih, ayda hantu i Taywan yadahtu ku palumaay tina langawan aadihan nu katuuday, katuu'd ku palumaay i luma' mala langad atu kakila lidungan nu dadan. bangcal ku langaw nu balu, taneng mala ilumaay a aadihan, sangan tu kilalidungan nu dadan atu aadihan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) sasapaiyuan i sanek han, adidi' kuni ka sicedaman, adidi' ku duku, taneng mipatay tuibiliay a cilekay atu milawpes tu i udipay a nanum paka kapah tu buwa', saka pingaayan tu imelanghan unika adadaan nu bili', sicilekay ku bili' nu wawa, u'hu'h, basal, katela'apan, mahicaay kya ku sawada', kahun nu adadaan sa. (kamu nu Hulam: .) milihida tu langaw musakamu atipelec u atipelec a langawan, atipelec a langawan han u hina hetikay ku papah apuyu ku langaw numi laladay a langawan, mah'ka mulutuc han patelak tapabawsa ku langaw, nikudan satu u akaway nu lali papahan, kala siceka' an ku langaw, adidi' henay kulangawsa kala tai'tai'an ku langaw nu kulit sibanuh. (kamu nu Hulam: .) nu cacayay a akawayan cacay ku papah nai'ku batac, wayway nu papah i lilis idaw ku apuyuay a masa ti'kukay atu satanayu' sananay kuni kakimulmul, tanayuhan makaala tu walu-sabawcacay a kun-fun, ahebal han makaala tu lima a kun-fun. (kamu nu Hulam: .) i lima-pulu' a bulad kala bangasisan nu limaay a sa semaan a babaluwan, bilbil nu balu han naw sanglacay henay hamawsa a mala sumanah ku kulit, yadah ku balu nai' ku akaway, nika silsilan nai' kuwatan tuni tu kakabitan tu akawayan, macebal satu ku balu sulecadsa ku silac, numasa sakakuay a kakicuhan lima' kunika papela, tama a baluhan makaala tu pulu' a babaluan. (kamu nu Hulam:śĖľ5-10 10śěö.) nika minan tu asibalu, malaheci tu mahida' u cukana' ku heci nida kala lumelumenian ku pa'nu', sadicem sa lima ku kuku', cacay kui labuay nu sanglacaya a sasapalan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) picidekan a wayway hina hetikay a papah nu milaladay a lalangawan,u langawhan nida kala tai'tai'an ku kulit apuyu ku banuh, mahka mulutucay a langawhan malecad tu kala tai'tai'an ku kulit sibanuh, langaw sahenay patelek ku akaway, nikudan a papah nu akaway masumad, kala sicekacekaan sa malingatu tu amilalad. masasuayaw ku papah i akaway, idaw ku apuyuay a akawayan, satanayu sa kunika mulmul, inuayawan han kala dicendicenman, angangan han mahida u balucu' ku wayway, pulung nu lilisan, u tanayu makaala tu tu pitu‚Äďsabaw tusa a kun-fun, u ahebalhan han maka alatu sepat-enem a kun-fun, papah nu akaway han nu balakiay tu a lalangawan, hamaw satu a atekak kala sicekacekaan tu. (kamu nu Hulam:ŤĎČŚįćÁĒü,śúČÁü≠śüĄ, .) macebal ku balu nai' ku kakicuh aapuyu ku akaway maca celcelay kunika si baluan, sema nu baluhan naw sanglacay alaw mala sumanahay, idaw ku bangsis, lima ku asasemaan a baluwan, satanayu'sa ku kakicuh, lima kunika papelaan, nikapapela'an han masa sangkaku, tama han a baluwan pulu' ku sasemaan nu balu, adidi mahida u keliw aapuyu ku ngisngis, i sisasa' ku sasapalan, tanayu' ku kakabitan nu balu. u hecih mahida u cukana', maduhem satu kala lumelumenian, lima ku kuku'. kasi baluwan atu kaduheman nu heci sa i lima a bulad katukuh i pulu' a bulad. (kamu nu Hulam: 5~10 śúą.) dumasatu nuni kasingangan tina langawan namakayni i tademaw, namahida yu mukasi idaw ku i Pan-coay a niyaduan, idaw ku cacayay a misaydangay ci Kuo-se-cun sakamu sa, hina miala' cinida tu heci nu atipelec sapingay tu nu wawaan a imelan, sisa dateng nu tilu a tademaw, pangangan han tu kina langaw u atipelec han. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kakinkiwan tu sasapaiyuwan nina maduhemay a atipelec nu heci kanca a hudhuden ku maduhemay a heci, i kabanglangbangaan han u pudac nu heci kalakiyu lumenian sa taneng tu alaan, siluden alan ku damud sa pawalian tu cilal atu mihudhud. uhekal kala lumelumenian katukuh tu kiyukiyuwan kunika lumeni' ku kulit, malikad a adihan ku pudac, satanayu' sa kunika kimulmul atu makimulmul, pelaen amicikcik mahida u bunac kunika lima ku madiicemay nu kuku', inikadiceman nu kuku' kibetul ku paduh, teban hantu makimulmul nai' ku labuay, atekaksa ku paduh, u sasapalan a paduh han duhepic hina hetik, heci nu papahan kala lawlawan sangsanglacan ku kulit, tusa ku sasemaan nu balu, maputun kunika pelaan nu sasulit, idaw kusi simalay, adidi' kunika bangsian, kala sicesicedaman ku sanek. (kamu nu Hulam: ,ŚĎ≥ŚĺģÁĒú.) nina atipelec a langawan itini i "iyuay a cudad nu Cun-kuo" tusa a malebut idawku lima a mihcaan anika tahekalan i cudad, sakay i nu cunyaw a Atipelec nu langawan a alangawan, mangalay maydih pakayda i wayway nu langaw , mikuwan tu saka kapah nu sasapayuwan. mitaneng tu kakawaw anu mahica ku tabaki, kala kiyukiyuwan lumelumenian ku kulit, masadid ku paduh, mabiteli, kala lawlawan sangsanglacan ku kulit u sakapahay a sasapayuwan sa. (kamu nu Hulam: .) u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika Combretum indicum, also known as the Chinese honeysuckle or Rangoon creeper, is a vine with red flower clusters and is found in Asia. It is found in many other parts of the world either as a cultivated ornamental or run wild. Other names for the plant include Quiscual , Niyog-niyogan , Madhu Malti or Madhumalti , Modhumonjori (ŗ¶ģŗ¶ßŗßĀŗ¶ģŗ¶ěŗßćŗ¶úŗ¶įŗßÄ in Bengali; named by Rabindranath Tagore), Malati , Madhumaloti (ŗ¶ģŗ¶ßŗßĀŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗßčŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņ in Meitei), Akar Dani and Radha Manoharam .
S.PHON: == atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ == *** u masaj, ju adidi Ē~ °aj ńß…ônaj u adidi Ē~ °aj a kir~…ĺaŇč. mauzip i tajwan, ¶ńßina, india. masadumaaj a ŇčaŇčan *uis*uar~…ĺis indi ¶a r~…ĺ. (mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan)*uis*uar~…ĺis indi ¶a r~…ĺ. **** (sapamataan a ŇčaŇčan) ¶ombr…ôta ¶…ôa…ô **** (mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu ŇčaŇčan)atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ a su (tada ŇčaŇčan)r~…ĺiw- ¶iu- ¶…ô, si- ¶un-s…ô, u-r~…ĺin- ¶…ô, tun- ¶un- ¶…ô, pin-kan- ¶…ô, du Ē~ °- ¶i-r~…ĺi- ¶…ô, suj- ¶un-mu-ja, san-jaŇč-s…ô, s…ô Ē~ °-kan- ¶…ô, s…ô Ē~ °-kan- ¶…ô, s…ô Ē~ °-kan-k…ôn *aŇčoon ¶r…ô…ôp…ôr (iŇču a ŇčaŇčan)*aŇčoon ¶r…ô…ôp…ôr ** sidi tu isańß,**** atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ (kamu nu bina ¶adan)bunun sidi tu isańß,sakidaja **,****,* (mitaduaj nu bina ¶adan)bunun, sakidaja, ¶o atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶,* *uŇča*uŇč mitatin (kamunu bina ¶adan)bunun sidi tu isańß,sakidaja atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶, ¶o *uŇča*uŇč mitatin kar~…ĺiwasak nu r~…ĺaŇčaw manamuńß mur~…ĺaŇčaw i dińß…ôkuaj a kitidaan, misuajaw tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ misudikud tu bar~…ĺi a kakitidaan, sisa ńßina adińß kita i bujubujuan, kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan, nipar~…ĺumaan nutaw a maadińß, ajda ńßantu i tajwan jadańßtu ku par~…ĺumaaj tina r~…ĺaŇčawan aadińßan nu katuudaj, katuu Ē~ °d ku par~…ĺumaaj i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa r~…ĺaŇčad atu kakir~…ĺa r~…ĺiduŇčan nu dadan. baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku r~…ĺaŇčaw nu bar~…ĺu, tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺa ir~…ĺumaaj a aadińßan, saŇčan tu kir~…ĺar~…ĺiduŇčan nu dadan atu aadińßan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) sasapaijuan i san…ôk ńßan, adidi Ē~ ° kuni ka si ¶…ôdaman, adidi Ē~ ° ku duku, tan…ôŇč mipataj tuibir~…ĺiaj a ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj atu mir~…ĺawp…ôs tu i udipaj a nanum paka kapańß tu buwa Ē~ °, saka piŇčaajan tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčńßan unika adadaan nu bir~…ĺi Ē~ °, si ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ku bir~…ĺi Ē~ ° nu wawa, u Ē~ °ńßu Ē~ °ńß, basar~…ĺ, kat…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °apan, mańßi ¶aaj kja ku sawada Ē~ °, kańßun nu adadaan sa. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) mir~…ĺińßida tu r~…ĺaŇčaw musakamu atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ u atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ a r~…ĺaŇčawan, atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ a r~…ĺaŇčawan ńßan u ńßina ńß…ôtikaj ku papańß apuju ku r~…ĺaŇčaw numi r~…ĺar~…ĺadaj a r~…ĺaŇčawan, mańß Ē~ °ka mur~…ĺutu ¶ ńßan pat…ôr~…ĺak tapabawsa ku r~…ĺaŇčaw, nikudan satu u akawaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺi papańßan, kar~…ĺa si ¶…ôka Ē~ ° an ku r~…ĺaŇčaw, adidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj kur~…ĺaŇčawsa kar~…ĺa tai Ē~ °tai Ē~ °an ku r~…ĺaŇčaw nu kur~…ĺit sibanuńß. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) nu ¶a ¶ajaj a akawajan ¶a ¶aj ku papańß nai Ē~ °ku bata ¶, wajwaj nu papańß i r~…ĺir~…ĺis idaw ku apujuaj a masa ti Ē~ °kukaj atu satanaju Ē~ ° sananaj kuni kakimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, tanajuńßan makaar~…ĺa tu war~…ĺu-sabaw ¶a ¶aj a kun-fun, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima a kun-fun. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) i r~…ĺima-pur~…ĺu Ē~ ° a bur~…ĺad kar~…ĺa baŇčasisan nu r~…ĺimaaj a sa s…ômaan a babar~…ĺuwan, bir~…ĺbir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺu ńßan naw saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj ńß…ônaj ńßamawsa a mar~…ĺa sumanańß ku kur~…ĺit, jadańß ku bar~…ĺu nai Ē~ ° ku akawaj, nika sir~…ĺsir~…ĺan nai Ē~ ° kuwatan tuni tu kakabitan tu akawajan, ma ¶…ôbar~…ĺ satu ku bar~…ĺu sur~…ĺ…ô ¶adsa ku sir~…ĺa ¶, numasa sakakuaj a kaki ¶uńßan r~…ĺima Ē~ ° kunika pap…ôr~…ĺa, tama a bar~…ĺuńßan makaar~…ĺa tu pur~…ĺu Ē~ ° a babar~…ĺuan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:**-** ***.) nika minan tu asibar~…ĺu, mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu mańßida Ē~ ° u ¶ukana Ē~ ° ku ńß…ô ¶i nida kar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ôr~…ĺum…ônian ku pa Ē~ °nu Ē~ °, sadi ¶…ôm sa r~…ĺima ku kuku Ē~ °, ¶a ¶aj kui r~…ĺabuaj nu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aja a sasapar~…ĺan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) pi ¶id…ôkan a wajwaj ńßina ńß…ôtikaj a papańß nu mir~…ĺar~…ĺadaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan,u r~…ĺaŇčawńßan nida kar~…ĺa tai Ē~ °tai Ē~ °an ku kur~…ĺit apuju ku banuńß, mańßka mur~…ĺutu ¶aj a r~…ĺaŇčawńßan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu kar~…ĺa tai Ē~ °tai Ē~ °an ku kur~…ĺit sibanuńß, r~…ĺaŇčaw sańß…ônaj pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk ku akawaj, nikudan a papańß nu akawaj masumad, kar~…ĺa si ¶…ôka ¶…ôkaan sa mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu amir~…ĺar~…ĺad. masasuajaw ku papańß i akawaj, idaw ku apujuaj a akawajan, satanaju sa kunika mur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, inuajawan ńßan kar~…ĺa di ¶…ôndi ¶…ônman, aŇčaŇčan ńßan mańßida u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ku wajwaj, pur~…ĺuŇč nu r~…ĺir~…ĺisan, u tanaju makaar~…ĺa tu tu pitu*sabaw tusa a kun-fun, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺńßan ńßan maka ar~…ĺatu s…ôpat-…ôn…ôm a kun-fun, papańß nu akawaj ńßan nu bar~…ĺakiaj tu a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, ńßamaw satu a at…ôkak kar~…ĺa si ¶…ôka ¶…ôkaan tu. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:***,***, .) ma ¶…ôbar~…ĺ ku bar~…ĺu nai Ē~ ° ku kaki ¶uńß aapuju ku akawaj ma ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺaj kunika si bar~…ĺuan, s…ôma nu bar~…ĺuńßan naw saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺa sumanańßaj, idaw ku baŇčsis, r~…ĺima ku asas…ômaan a bar~…ĺuwan, satanaju Ē~ °sa ku kaki ¶uńß, r~…ĺima kunika pap…ôr~…ĺaan, nikapap…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °an ńßan masa saŇčkaku, tama ńßan a bar~…ĺuwan pur~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku sas…ômaan nu bar~…ĺu, adidi mańßida u k…ôr~…ĺiw aapuju ku ŇčisŇčis, i sisasa Ē~ ° ku sasapar~…ĺan, tanaju Ē~ ° ku kakabitan nu bar~…ĺu. u ńß…ô ¶ińß mańßida u ¶ukana Ē~ °, maduńß…ôm satu kar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ôr~…ĺum…ônian, r~…ĺima ku kuku Ē~ °. kasi bar~…ĺuwan atu kaduńß…ôman nu ńß…ô ¶i sa i r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad katukuńß i pur~…ĺu Ē~ ° a bur~…ĺad. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: *~** *.) dumasatu nuni kasiŇčaŇčan tina r~…ĺaŇčawan namakajni i tad…ômaw, namańßida ju mukasi idaw ku i pan- ¶oaj a nijaduan, idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a misajdaŇčaj ¶i kuo-s…ô- ¶un sakamu sa, ńßina miar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶inida tu ńß…ô ¶i nu atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ sapiŇčaj tu nu wawaan a im…ôr~…ĺan, sisa dat…ôŇč nu tir~…ĺu a tad…ômaw, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu kina r~…ĺaŇčaw u atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ ńßan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kakinkiwan tu sasapaijuwan nina maduńß…ômaj a atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ nu ńß…ô ¶i kan ¶a a ńßudńßud…ôn ku maduńß…ômaj a ńß…ô ¶i, i kabaŇčr~…ĺaŇčbaŇčaan ńßan u puda ¶ nu ńß…ô ¶i kar~…ĺakiju r~…ĺum…ônian sa tan…ôŇč tu ar~…ĺaan, sir~…ĺud…ôn ar~…ĺan ku damud sa pawar~…ĺian tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ atu mińßudńßud. uńß…ôkar~…ĺ kar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ôr~…ĺum…ônian katukuńß tu kijukijuwan kunika r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° ku kur~…ĺit, mar~…ĺikad a adińßan ku puda ¶, satanaju Ē~ ° sa kunika kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ atu makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, p…ôr~…ĺa…ôn ami ¶ik ¶ik mańßida u buna ¶ kunika r~…ĺima ku madii ¶…ômaj nu kuku Ē~ °, inikadi ¶…ôman nu kuku Ē~ ° kib…ôtur~…ĺ ku paduńß, t…ôban ńßantu makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ nai Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺabuaj, at…ôkaksa ku paduńß, u sasapar~…ĺan a paduńß ńßan duńß…ôpi ¶ ńßina ńß…ôtik, ńß…ô ¶i nu papańßan kar~…ĺa r~…ĺawr~…ĺawan saŇčsaŇčr~…ĺa ¶an ku kur~…ĺit, tusa ku sas…ômaan nu bar~…ĺu, maputun kunika p…ôr~…ĺaan nu sasur~…ĺit, idaw kusi simar~…ĺaj, adidi Ē~ ° kunika baŇčsian, kar~…ĺa si ¶…ôsi ¶…ôdaman ku san…ôk. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ,***.) nina atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ a r~…ĺaŇčawan itini i "ijuaj a ¶udad nu ¶un-kuo" tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idawku r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan anika tańß…ôkar~…ĺan i ¶udad, sakaj i nu ¶unjaw a atip…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ nu r~…ĺaŇčawan a ar~…ĺaŇčawan, maŇčar~…ĺaj majdińß pakajda i wajwaj nu r~…ĺaŇčaw , mikuwan tu saka kapańß nu sasapajuwan. mitan…ôŇč tu kakawaw anu mańßi ¶a ku tabaki, kar~…ĺa kijukijuwan r~…ĺum…ôr~…ĺum…ônian ku kur~…ĺit, masadid ku paduńß, mabit…ôr~…ĺi, kar~…ĺa r~…ĺawr~…ĺawan saŇčsaŇčr~…ĺa ¶an ku kur~…ĺit u sakapańßaj a sasapajuwan sa. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika ¶ombr…ôtum indi ¶um, ar~…ĺso known as tńß…ô ¶ńßin…ôs…ô ńßon…ôsu ¶kr~…ĺ…ô or *aŇčoon ¶r…ô…ôp…ôr, is a *in…ô witńß r…ôd fr~…ĺow…ôr ¶r~…ĺust…ôrs and is found in asia. it is found in manj otńß…ôr parts of tńß…ô worr~…ĺd …ôitńß…ôr as a ¶ur~…ĺti*at…ôd ornam…ôntar~…ĺ or run wir~…ĺd. otńß…ôr nam…ôs for tńß…ô pr~…ĺant in ¶r~…ĺud…ô *uis ¶uar~…ĺ , nijog-nijogan , madńßu mar~…ĺti or madńßumar~…ĺti , modńßumonjori (********* in b…ôŇčar~…ĺi; nam…ôd bj *abindranatńß tagor…ô), mar~…ĺati , madńßumar~…ĺoti (********* in m…ôit…ôi), akar dani and *adńßa manońßaram .
